title: VanishPluse
body:
VanishPlus - 1.21.4
VanishPlus is a simple and convenient plugin for Spigot/Paper servers (version 1.21.4). It allows players with the appropriate permissions to toggle invisibility, completely hiding them from other players (including the tab list, inventory, and any actions). It also includes a command to summon lightning, which temporarily reveals invisibility.

Commands:

/v — toggles invisibility on or off.

/vth — summons lightning. If the player is invisible, they become visible for 5 seconds.

Permissions:

vanishplus.use — access to the /v command.

vanishplus.thunder — access to the /vth command.

vanishplus.see — allows seeing invisible players.

The plugin requires no configuration; everything is managed through permissions. Perfect for admins who want to monitor players discreetly or add fun features to their server.
